title: Casualties reported
description: 🤬 Katsaps killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Gulyaipilskyi 🔄 Despite the so-called "ceasefire", the enemy continues what he was doing. Today, around 5:30 p.m. near Gulyaipilskyi, with the use of fpv drones, snipers killed a group of our wounded. 💬 Another illusion of the partners that the Muscovite wants peace must be shattered. Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...
description_en: 🤬 Katsaps killed a Ukrainian evacuation group near Gulyaipilskyi 🔄 Despite the so-called "ceasefire", the enemy continues what he was doing. Today, around 5:30 p.m. near Gulyaipilskyi, with the use of fpv drones, snipers killed a group of our wounded. 💬 Another illusion of the partners that the Muscovite wants peace must be shattered. Only by joint power, and not by playing along, can you make the bastards sit down for...
description_uk: 🤬 Кацапи вбили українську евакуаційну групу поблизу Гуляйпільського 🔄 Незважаючи на так зване "припинення вогню", ворог продовжує те, що і робив. Сьогодні близько 17:30 поблизу Гуляйпілського, з використанням fpv-дронів кацапи вбили групу наших поранених. 💬 Чергові ілюзії партнерів, що москаль хоче миру, мають бути розбиті. Лише спільною силою, а не підіграванням, можна змусити виродків сісти за...

title: Drone strike
description: After 4:00 p.m., 469 ceasefire violations were recorded, - the General Staff reports that the Russians conducted 22 enemy assaults, 153 shelling, 19 kamikaze drone strikes (Lancet, Lightning) and 275 FPV drone strikes.
description_en: After 4:00 p.m., 469 ceasefire violations were recorded, - the General Staff reports that the Russians conducted 22 enemy assaults, 153 shelling, 19 kamikaze drone strikes (Lancet, Lightning) and 275 FPV drone strikes.
description_uk: После 16:00 зафиксировано 469 нарушений режима прекращения огня, - Генштаб Сообщается, что россияне провели 22 штурмовых действия противника, 153 обстрела, 19 ударов дронами-камикадзе («Ланцет», «Молния») и 275 ударов FPV-дронами.

title: Crimea: Attack attack
description: Ukraine strikes oil facilities in Russia, occupied Crimea. Ukrainian armed forces said they struck two oil facilities overnight on April 11, targeting the Krymskaya oil pumping station in Russia's Krasnodar Krai and the Gvardiyskaya oil depot in occupied Crimea.
description_en: Ukraine strikes oil facilities in Russia, occupied Crimea. Ukrainian armed forces said they struck two oil facilities overnight on April 11, targeting the Krymskaya oil pumping station in Russia's Krasnodar Krai and the Gvardiyskaya oil depot in occupied Crimea.
description_uk: Ukraine strikes oil facilities in Russia, occupied Crimea. Ukrainian armed forces said they struck two oil facilities overnight on April 11, targeting the Krymskaya oil pumping station in Russia's Krasnodar Krai and the Gvardiyskaya oil depot in occupied Crimea.

On Monday, there will be a detailed report from Rustem Umerov on all agreements in the Middle East, the Gulf, and other countries...

title: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Ukraine hit an oil depot and an oil pumping station "Krymskaya" on the territory of the Russian Federation, - the General Staff. Three ammunition warehouses in the Donetsk and Zaporozhye regions, UAV control points and concentrations of enemy manpower were also hit. Losses and extent of damage are specified.
description_en: Ukraine hit an oil depot and an oil pumping station "Krymskaya" on the territory of the Russian Federation, - the General Staff. Three ammunition warehouses in the Donetsk and Zaporozhye regions, UAV control points and concentrations of enemy manpower were also hit. Losses and extent of damage are specified.
description_uk: Украина поразила нефтебазу и нефтеперекачивающую станцию "Крымская" на территории рф, - Генштаб Также поражены три склада боеприпасов в Донецкой и Запорожской областях, пункты управления БПЛА и скопления живой силы противника. Потери и масштабы ущерба уточняются.

title: Kramatorsk: Airstrike attack
description: Russian airstrike injures at least 10 in Donetsk Oblast. Russian troops dropped three glide bombs on the city of Kramatorsk in Donetsk Oblast on April 11, injuring at least 10 people, Governor Vadym Filashkin said.
description_en: Russian airstrike injures at least 10 in Donetsk Oblast. Russian troops dropped three glide bombs on the city of Kramatorsk in Donetsk Oblast on April 11, injuring at least 10 people, Governor Vadym Filashkin said.

description: Ours are returning home. 175 military personnel. Soldiers of the Armed Forces, national guardsmen, border guards. Privates, sergeants and officers. And seven civilians. Our soldiers defended Ukraine in various directions: in Mariupol, at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant, in the Donetsk, Luhansk, Kharkiv, Kherson, Zaporizhzhya, Sumy, Kyiv, Kursk directions. There are wounded among them. Most have been in captivity since 2022. And finally -...
description_en: Ours are returning home. 175 military personnel. Soldiers of the Armed Forces, national guardsmen, border guards. Privates, sergeants and officers. And seven civilians. Our soldiers defended Ukraine in various directions: in Mariupol, at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant, in the Donetsk, Luhansk, Kharkiv, Kherson, Zaporizhzhya, Sumy, Kyiv, Kursk directions. There are wounded among them. Most have been in captivity since 2022. And finally -...
description_uk: Наші повертаються додому. 175 військових. Воїни Збройних Сил, нацгвардійці, прикордонники. Рядові, сержанти та офіцери. І семеро цивільних. Наші воїни захищали Україну на різних напрямках: у Маріуполі, на ЧАЕС, на Донецькому, Луганському, Харківському, Херсонському, Запорізькому, Сумському, Київському, Курському напрямках. Серед них є поранені. Більшість була в полоні з 2022 року. І нарешті –...
